comment: 48yo female radiologic technologist, 22 years interventional-radiology suite (fluoroscopy-heavy practice, documented lifetime occupational dose tracking), no current malignancy. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-OCC-IONIZING-RADIATION-PREVENTION-INTENSIFIED-SURVEILLANCE (CBC q1y + thyroid US q3-5y + lifetime dose-equivalent review + ALARA counseling + standard breast screening); alternative = IND-OCC-IONIZING-RADIATION-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION. Validates v0.3 RF-OCC-IONIZING-RADIATION-PREVENTION pilot (AML/thyroid/breast/lung risk).
